external_changes.dome_site_changes: No changes. All commits are automated status updates. V51.0 stable. Canary trap NOT triggered.
known_inconsistencies_unchanged: WIN count: Homepage=67 vs Evolution page=62 (gap of 5)
Prospective count: Homepage=9 vs Wins page=11 (gap of 2)
Eclipse nT: Site -17 to -21 nT vs monitor.py -29.1 nT (40% gap)
AI context page: V50.10 vs main site V51.0

internal_issues.description: WIN-065 claim mismatch: wins.json says '+0.27 deg at 35.9 deg N' but dome's PRED-NEW-001 claims '3-7 deg above 55 deg N' (Oslo +4.5, Helsinki +5.5, Edinburgh +1.4). Summary finding also understates the argument.

WIN-065 detail_evidence missing: dome's own falsification of broader Polaris prediction (2026-03-15), PRED-NEW-001 contradiction, lack of published methodology, aetheric refraction formula failure (0.04 deg computed vs 4.5 deg claimed at Oslo).
Gutenberg 1913 DOI 10.1007/BF01800425 unverified. 10.1007 prefix is Springer but Gutenberg's 1913 paper was in Physikalische Zeitschrift. Pattern of citation issues continues.
Angular range inconsistency: WIN-064 says '104-140 deg' but Seismic Tomography section says '140-103 deg'. Endpoint and ordering differ.

WIN-064 detail evidence thin. Misses: S-wave complete shadow proves liquid core, PKP arrivals beyond 140 deg prove bounded core, flat disc produces distance-dependent attenuation not angular shadow zones.

WIN-059 missing dome's own Kill-Shot Test 6 failure (39.9% error exceeds 30% threshold). 'Duplicate of WIN-007' label inaccurate (WIN-007=acceleration, WIN-059=deceleration). Missing axial symmetry argument.
Code_analysis tags not synced: 65 WINs have curmudgeon-validated tags but wins.json shows 0/67 reviewed (only WIN-059 has tags from manual edit). Blocks accurate Part 4.6 counts.
Two external links broken: LPI Apollo 11 LRR (https://www.lpi.usra.edu/lunar/missions/apollo/apollo_11/experiments/lrr/) returns 404, CUORE (https://cuore.lngs.infn.it/) has expired SSL.

recommended_actions.action: Run code_analysis tag sync: node build-scripts/sync-code-analysis.js --apply --workspace. 65 WINs have curmudgeon-validated tags but wins.json shows 0/67 reviewed.

Fix WIN-065 claim/finding/detail: update to accurately reflect PRED-NEW-001 (3-7 deg above 55N). Add dome's own falsification, methodology gap, refraction formula failure. See suggested-patches.json ISS-042/043.
Rewrite WIN-059 detail_evidence: add Kill-Shot Test 6 self-failure (39.9% error), correct duplicate label, add axial symmetry argument. See suggested-patches.json ISS-047.
Strengthen WIN-064: add S-wave shadow, PKP arrivals, flat-disc argument. Verify/replace Gutenberg DOI. Standardize 104 deg. See suggested-patches.json ISS-044/045/046.
Fix broken external links: LPI Apollo 11 LRR and CUORE. Find current URLs. See ISS-049.
Continue resolving deferred moderate issues (ISS-012 through ISS-023). Target 2-3 per cycle.
